glossary.angular: Angular provides a structured way to build interactive web applications that are easier to maintain as they grow.
glossary.typescript: TypeScript adds safety checks to JavaScript, helping developers find mistakes before an application runs.
glossary.nodeJs: Node.js lets JavaScript run on servers to handle data, business logic and connections.
glossary.express: Express simplifies building web servers and connections between applications with Node.js.
glossary.scss: SCSS makes website styling easier to organize, reuse and maintain.
glossary.rxjs: RxJS helps applications manage events and information that arrive or change over time.
glossary.docker: Docker packages an application with everything it needs, so it runs reliably on different computers.
glossary.api: An API allows different applications or services to exchange information.
glossary.restApi: A REST API is a common, predictable way for applications to request and exchange information over the web.
glossary.webSocket: WebSocket keeps a live two-way connection open so updates can appear immediately.
glossary.ros: ROS provides shared tools that help a robot's software and hardware components work together.
glossary.mqtt: MQTT is a lightweight messaging system that helps machines and sensors exchange small updates efficiently.
glossary.ai: AI enables software to recognize patterns, interpret information and assist with decisions or tasks.
glossary.gerrit: Gerrit helps teams review and approve code changes before they become part of an application.
glossary.cSharp: C# is a programming language commonly used to build reliable applications and online services.
glossary.dotNet: .NET is Microsoft's platform for building and running applications across different environments.
glossary.sql: SQL is used to store, organize and retrieve information from databases.
glossary.azureDevOps: Azure DevOps provides tools for planning, building, testing and releasing software as a team.
glossary.fastApi: FastAPI helps developers create fast and reliable web services with Python.
glossary.python: Python is a readable programming language used for web services, automation, data and AI.
glossary.dynamics365: Microsoft Dynamics 365 brings customer, sales and business processes together in connected applications.
glossary.powerPlatform: Power Platform helps organizations create applications and automate workflows with less custom code.
glossary.ionic: Ionic uses web technologies to create applications that can run on mobile devices.
glossary.ngrx: NgRx keeps an Angular application's shared information organized and predictable as it changes.
glossary.seo: SEO helps search engines understand a website and makes it easier for people to find.
glossary.ciCd: CI/CD automates testing and releasing software, making updates faster and safer.

highlights: Lead the development of an autonomous agricultural robotics platform designed to remove weeds without toxic herbicides.
Drive software architecture, development activities, and technical direction across the robot software ecosystem.
Coordinate developers working on robot implementation, testing, validation, and field-ready software delivery.
Develop full-stack features across an Angular operator interface and a Node.js backend deployed on the robot.
Collaborate with robotics, AI, and hardware engineers to integrate AI-powered weed detection into operational workflows.
Managed the full development cycle of critical applications supporting operational processes in a regulated nuclear environment.
Designed and delivered tools for personnel accreditation, sealed source management, technical equipment requalification, and long-term operation support.
Built secure and reliable software solutions focused on efficiency, traceability, compliance, and operational continuity.
Led front-end development of an internal recruitment platform connected to a FastAPI Python backend.
Implemented AI-assisted features to process CV files, extract relevant information, and support recruiter workflows.
Defined coding standards, reusable patterns, and best practices to improve maintainability and delivery quality.
Architected and developed an Angular application integrated with REST APIs and a C#/.NET backend.
Connected multiple data sources, including Siemens, custom, and local databases.
Built data visualization features including graphs, tables, image rendering, and analytical views.
Delivered a feature-rich application helping stakeholders retrieve filtered samples and generate actionable insights.
Designed and optimized C# microprocesses tailored to analytical and laboratory workflows.
Automated experiment file uploads, data extraction, calculations, and secure database integration.
Supported approximately 15 testing methodologies while improving productivity, data integrity, and process reliability.
Completed an intensive training program focused on the Microsoft Dynamics 365 suite.
Collaborated with a multidisciplinary team to deliver a final project based on Dynamics 365 solutions.
Strengthened consulting, delivery, and enterprise software implementation practices.
Maintained and enhanced mobile applications built with Angular and Ionic.
Worked on geolocation features, RxJS-based flows, NgRx state management, and mobile UI styling.
Contributed to research and development initiatives focused on user experience and application performance.
Developed a full-stack application for managing room reservations in public services.
Built the Angular front end and Node.js backend, including business logic and database interactions.
Designed user interfaces and ensured consistent integration across the full application stack.
